# Minimum allowed Go coverage by package directory.
# Format: <package-path> <minimum-percent>
#
# Packages are grouped by tier:
#   Tier 1 — core backend logic (higher thresholds)
#   Tier 2 — infrastructure and integrations (baseline thresholds)
#   Tier 3 — newly tracked (start at 0, ratchet up as tests land)

# --- Tier 1: Core backend ---
pkg/agent 48.0
pkg/api 60.5
pkg/k8s 68.5

# --- Tier 2: Critical integrations ---
pkg/notifications 75.0
pkg/kagentiprovider 0.0
pkg/sanitize 85.0
pkg/store 42.0

# --- Tier 3: Supporting packages ---
pkg/kagent 0.0
pkg/mcp 0.0
pkg/models 0.0
pkg/stellar 0.0
pkg/watcher 70.0
pkg/settings 0.0
pkg/rewards 0.0
pkg/safego 65.0
pkg/fileutil 0.0

pkg/compliance/fedramp 65.0
pkg/compliance/hipaa 70.0
pkg/compliance/nist80053 65.0
pkg/compliance/slsa 60.0
pkg/compliance/sbom 60.0
pkg/compliance/signing 60.0
pkg/compliance/licenses 55.0
pkg/compliance/stig 65.0
pkg/compliance/baa 65.0
